title: Golems Are Friends Not Fodder
description: This mod makes Armorer, Toolsmith and Weaponsmith villagers attempt to repair damaged golems in their village during daytime.
body:
I find it odd that villagers will look idly as you chop up their only defense against the darkness for some early game iron or that they don't provide any comfort or even a little thanks the stout fellows after they've patrolled the town tirelessly all night mowing down zombie after zombie.

Enough I say. The villagers are clearly inheriting the mindset of Mojang of not caring for their golems but this mod puts an end to it.

From this day forth, Armorers, Toolsmiths and Weaponsmiths will attempt to repair damaged golems in their village during daytime. 

Install this mod at once if you are not as cold and uncaring as the Mojang developers.

It's only fair.


The love is extended to modded golems as well.


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
